headline: Dell Technologies to Present at Bank of America’s View From the Top CEO Series
summary: ROUND ROCK, Texas, March 31, 2026--Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) announces that Michael Dell, chairman and chief executive officer, will participate in a virtual fireside chat hosted by Wamsi Mohan of Bank of America on Tuesday, April 7, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. CT / 11:30 a.m. ET.

headline: Super Micro Computer Rises 5%: 3 Reasons Bulls Are Looking Past the Lawsuits
summary: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) shares rose 5% on Tuesday, trading around $22.20 after opening at $21.06. The move comes after a prolonged decline that had left SMCI shares down 28.05% year to date and 38.53% over the past year. The backdrop is anything but clean. headline: ‘Uninvestable’ Super Micro sends investors racing to the exits
summary: (Bloomberg) -- On paper, Super Micro Computer Inc. is the type of company that Wall Street can’t get enough of, with soaring sales, an enviable list of partners like Nvidia Corp. and its placement at the center of the artificial intelligence boom. But a series of self-inflicted wounds — the most recent being the indictment of its co-founder Yih-Shyan “Wally” Liaw on charges of circumventing US export restrictions to China — have investors fleeing the stock in droves.“We did exit it,” said Rob Th

headline: Dell Voice AI Push With Deepgram And Penguin Targets Enterprise Workloads
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL), Penguin Solutions, and Deepgram are collaborating to build dedicated enterprise voice AI infrastructure. The partnership focuses on Speech-to-Text, Text-to-Speech, and Voice Agent workloads tailored for real time, low latency performance. The solution uses Dell PowerEdge servers, PowerScale storage, and NVIDIA GPUs to target demanding enterprise AI deployments. For investors watching NYSE:DELL, this move reflects how the company is positioning its hardware...
